title: New global report flags risks to migratory freshwater fish in India’s rivers
summary: Freshwater fishes are among the “most imperilled vertebrates”, according to a new global assessment prepared for the Convention on the Conservation of Migratory Species of Wild Animals (CMS), which lays the legal foundation for internationally coordinated conservation measures throughout a migratory range. title: Thar desert dust carries bacteria to the Himalayas, a study finds
summary: Bacteria hitching a ride on the back of desert dust can find their way all the way from Thar up to the Himalayas, carrying with them bacteria harmful to health, new research shows.
